Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCD00 "KNIGHTMARE-CDE0-CD00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $cde0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Knightmare.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To allow the dump to start at $0400, the following changes were made:
1. Added an init routine at $CDE0 which copies 512 bytes of data from $CE00 down to $0200. It then jumps to the entry point at $CD00 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code). 2. The init routine originally found at $0012 has been moved to $3F80, so the JMP $0012 instruction at $CD85 has been patched to be JMP $3F80 instead.
